cancelMarket(string).details: Triggers full refunds via PositionVault. Bond is forfeited to treasury.

challengeResolution().details: Requires staking USDT equal to requiredChallengeStake()

params.amounts: Array of USDT amounts for each winner

finalizeResolution().details: Anyone can call this after challengeDeadline passes

getMarketInfo().details: Used by frontend to minimize RPC calls

liquidityTier().details: Market maker agent reads this to set per-market exposure cap

params.collateralAmount: USDT amount to commit (must be pre-approved)
params.encryptedCommitment: TEE-encrypted bytes containing direction and amount

params.reasoningHash: keccak256 hash of reasoning JSON written to 0G Storage
params.verdict: true = YES outcome, false = NO outcome

params.challengeUpheld: true if second oracle call overturns the verdict

returns._0: Seconds remaining, or 0 if deadline has passed

triggerResolution().details: Anyone can call this — just checks timestamp

USDT().notice: The USDT token address used for all collateral

cancelMarket(string).notice: Oracle agent cancels market if resolution is inconclusive

category().notice: Market category (crypto, sports, politics, finance, custom)

challengeDeadline().notice: Unix timestamp when the challenge window closes

challengeResolution().notice: File a challenge against the oracle's verdict

challengeResolved().notice: Whether the challenge has been processed

challengeStake().notice: Amount of USDT staked by the challenger

challenger().notice: Address of the user who filed a challenge (zero if no challenge)

creator().notice: The address that created this market

creatorBond().notice: USDT bond locked at creation — refunded on clean resolution or archive

deadline().notice: Unix timestamp when market closes and resolution begins

distributePayout(address[],uint256[]).notice: PayoutDistributor calls this to execute USDT transfers to winners

factory().notice: The ProphetFactory that deployed this market

finalizeResolution().notice: Finalize the market after challenge window expires with no challenge

getMarketInfo().notice: Returns core market state in a single call

hasBet(address).notice: Returns whether a specific address has placed a bet

isChallengeWindowOpen().notice: Returns whether the challenge window is currently open

liquidityTier().notice: Returns the current liquidity tier based on total collateral

oracleAgent().notice: The oracle agent address authorized to post resolutions

outcome().notice: Final outcome — true = YES won, false = NO won

placeBet(bytes,uint256).notice: Place a sealed bet on this market

postResolution(bool,bytes32,bytes).notice: Oracle agent posts its verdict after gathering evidence

processChallengeOutcome(bool).notice: Oracle agent processes the outcome of a filed challenge

requiredChallengeStake().notice: Returns the USDT amount required to file a challenge

resolutionSourcesHash().notice: keccak256 hash of the approved resolution sources JSON stored in 0G Storage

resolutionTimestamp().notice: Unix timestamp when the oracle posted its verdict

status().notice: Current lifecycle status of the market

timeUntilDeadline().notice: Returns seconds remaining until market deadline

totalCollateral().notice: Total USDT collateral deposited into this market

triggerResolution().notice: Move market to PendingResolution after deadline passes

verdictReasoningHash().notice: keccak256 hash of the oracle reasoning stored in 0G Storage Log Layer
